name: AETHLON MEDICAL INC
summary: Aethlon Medical, Inc. is a clinical-stage medical therapeutic company developing the Hemopurifier (HP), a lectin-based immunotherapeutic device designed to remove harmful extracellular vesicles (EVs) and enveloped viruses from biological fluids. The FDA has granted the Hemopurifier Breakthrough Device designation for advanced/metastatic cancer and life-threatening viruses. The company is conducting oncology clinical trials in Australia and pursuing approval in India.

products.name: Hemopurifier (HP)
products.description: Clinical-stage immunotherapeutic device using proprietary lectin-based mechanism to remove extracellular vesicles and enveloped viruses from biological fluids; FDA Breakthrough Device for cancer and life-threatening viruses.

partnerships.description: Site in India with HREC approval for Hemopurifier oncology clinical trial; awaiting CDSCO formal approval.
India-based CRO engaged to conduct Site Initiation Visit for Aethlon's India clinical trial.
Australian hospital with ethics committee approval, trained on device, and open for patient enrollment in oncology trial.
